positive: A vibrant, cinematic cyberpunk cityscape viewed through a rainy window. Neon signs in Japanese and English illuminate wet chrome streets and towering skyscrapers. Focus on volumetric lighting, deep shadows, reflective puddles, and high detail. Cinematic illustration, cyberpunk aesthetic, dramatic perspective.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, cartoonish, pastel colors, soft lighting
